latin: Festivus pro ceteris! hodie non festa publica celebramus sed Festivum. palus alumini stat pro arbore, et certamina virium patrem contra filium ponunt.

questions.prompt: What replaces the traditional holiday tree?

translation: Festivus for the rest of us! Today we do not celebrate public holidays but Festivus. An aluminum pole stands in place of a tree, and feats of strength pit father against son.
